recommendations.title: Last of the Renegades
recommendations.overview: Forester, a ruthless oil baron, wants to create a war between the native American tribes and the white men. Old Shatterhand, Winnetou and their sidekick Castlepool try to prevent this.

recommendations.title: Apache Gold
recommendations.overview: The construction of the Great Western Railroad creates heavy conflict between the railway company and neighboring Indian tribes. Worse, criminal gang leader Santer sets his eyes on a gold mine located on holy Indian land and influences the constructi

recommendations.title: Treasure of Silver Lake
recommendations.overview: Fred Engel's father is murdered by Colonel Brinkley in order to acquire a treasure map, however the Colonel only acquires half of it, the other half as held by Mrs. Butler. Discovering the scene of the crime, Old Shatterhand and Winnetou help Fred br

recommendations.title: The Searchers
recommendations.overview: As a Civil War veteran spends years searching for a young niece captured by Indians, his motivation becomes increasingly questionable.

recommendations.title: Little Big Man
recommendations.overview: Jack Crabb, looking back from extreme old age, tells of his life being raised by Indians and fighting with General Custer.

recommendations.title: My Name Is Nobody
recommendations.overview: Jack Beauregard, an aging gunman of the Old West, only wants to retire in peace and move to Europe, but a young gunfighter known as "Nobody" who idolizes Beauregard wants him to go out in a blaze of glory. So, he arranges for Jack to face the 150-man

recommendations.title: Manitou's Shoe
recommendations.overview: Abahachi, Chief of the Apache Indians, and his blood brother Ranger maintain peace and justice in the Wild West. One day, Abahachi needs to take up a credit from the Shoshone Indians to finance his tribe's new saloon. Unfortunately Santa Maria, who s

recommendations.title: Broken Arrow
recommendations.overview: Indian scout Tom Jeffords is sent out to stem the war between the American settlers and Apaches in the late 1870s Arizona. He learns that the Indians kill only to protect themselves, or out of retaliation for white atrocities.

recommendations.title: Stagecoach
recommendations.overview: A group of people traveling on a stagecoach find their journey complicated by the threat of Geronimo, and learn something about each other in the process.

recommendations.title: Jeremiah Johnson
recommendations.overview: A mountain man who wishes to live the life of a hermit becomes the unwilling object of a long vendetta by Indians when he proves to be the match of their warriors in one-on-one combat on the early frontier.
